svg.aria-label: define — the true meaning of a word, from the sentence around it
svg.title: define — contextual definition & translation
svg.desc: Pixel-art banner for the define Claude Code skill. Title "define" at top left. Below, three cards left to right: a SENTENCE card with the word "bank" highlighted inside "I sat on the bank of the river"; a warm-orange RESOLVE card disambiguating "× money store" (struck) versus "✓ river edge" (chosen) with the cue "river"; and a GLOSS card giving "land beside a river", register neutral, and a green CEFR A2 chip. Pixel arrows connect the cards; chapter markers run underneath.

g.font-family: ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo, DejaVu Sans Mono, monospace
g.text: the true meaning, from the sentence around it
